labels.analysis: The MCP Server "DevExpress Documentation" provides 2 tools focused on news & media tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: devexpress_docs_search, devexpress_docs_get_content.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "News & Media" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: press.

tools.name: devexpress_docs_search
tools.description:
Search DevExpress documentation for a given technology and a question.
If you want to search for multiple technologies, pass them as a list.
This tool returns only snippets/excerpts; full content requires a follow-up `devexpress_docs_get_content` call on a chosen URL.
ALWAYS call `devexpress_docs_search` before ANY `devexpress_docs_get_content` call in a user request chain.

technologies.description: List of DevExpress technologies to search within. Use specific technology names like 'WindowsForms', 'XtraReports', 'OfficeFileAPI' etc. You must choose from the allowed set.
technologies.title: Technologies

question.description: Your specific question or search query. Be descriptive and include relevant keywords about what you're trying to accomplish.
question.title: Question

tools.name: devexpress_docs_get_content
tools.description:
Get full document content by URL from DevExpress documentation.
Use this tool to retrieve the complete markdown content of a specific documentation page.
PREREQUISITE: ALWAYS call `devexpress_docs_search` before using this tool to get valid URLs.
The URL parameter must be obtained from the results of the `devexpress_docs_search` tool.

url.description: Full URL of a DevExpress documentation article. REQUIRED: This URL must be obtained from a previous call to `devexpress_docs_search` tool. Do not construct URLs using your general knowledge. Example: https://docs.devexpress.com/CoreLibraries/405204
url.title: Url
